candidates.why: Operating-section D&A row appears in the excerpt, but it has no visible values and does not clearly sit as a separate same-level add-on to the selected COGS row 'Cost of Revenues/COGS'. Operating-section amortization row appears in the excerpt, but it has no visible values and is not clearly identified as COGS-related or as a separate line outside the selected 'Cost of Revenues/COGS' bucket. To avoid double counting, do not add separately.
